system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.sproc_getcombo","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[SPROC_GETCOMBO](@VALUE INT)
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE @TEMP TABLE
	(
		CODE NVARCHAR(MAX),
		DESCRIPTION NVARCHAR(MAX),
		ATTRIBUTE1 NVARCHAR(MAX),
		ATTRIBUTE2 NVARCHAR(MAX),
		ATTRIBUTE3 NVARCHAR(MAX)
	);

	IF @VALUE = 1 -- LOAD NHÓM VẬT TƯ
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @TEMP (CODE, DESCRIPTION)
		SELECT DISTINCT nhom, NULL FROM tr_material WITH(NOLOCK) ORDER BY nhom
	END
		
	IF @VALUE = 2 -- LOAD KHÁCH HÀNG
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @TEMP (CODE, DESCRIPTION)
		select customer_id, customer_name from tr_khachhang with(nolock) ORDER BY customer_id
	END

	IF @VALUE = 3 -- LOAD HỆ HÀNG
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @TEMP (CODE, DESCRIPTION)
		SELECT tenhh, NULL FROM DQHF.dbo.tr_hehang WITH(NOLOCK) ORDER BY tenhh
	END

	IF @VALUE = 4 -- LOAD LOẠI ĐƠN HÀNG
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @TEMP (CODE, DESCRIPTION)
		select tenloaidh, NULL from tr_loaidh WITH(NOLOCK) order by tenloaidh
	END

	IF @VALUE = 5 -- LOAD NHÀ CUNG CẤP
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @TEMP (CODE, DESCRIPTION)
		select vendor_id, vendor_name from tr_nhacc WITH(NOLOCK) order by vendor_id
	END

	IF @VALUE = 6 -- LOAD khu vực
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @TEMP (CODE, DESCRIPTION)
		select khuvuc, ghichu from tr_khuvuc WITH(NOLOCK) order by khuvuc
	END

	IF @VALUE = 7 -- LOAD LOẠI SẢN PHẨM
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @TEMP (CODE, DESCRIPTION)
		SELECT maloaisp, tenloaisp FROM DQHF.dbo.tr_loaisp WITH(NOLOCK) order by tenloaisp
	END

	IF @VALUE = 8 -- LOAD NGUYÊN LIỆU
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @TEMP (CODE, DESCRIPTION)
		SELECT tennl, NULL FROM DQHF.dbo.tr_nguyenlieu WITH(NOLOCK) ORDER BY tennl
	END

	IF @VALUE = 9 -- LOAD RESOURCE
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @TEMP (CODE, DESCRIPTION, ATTRIBUTE1)
		select code, name, uom from tr_resource with(nolock) ORDER BY code
	END

	IF @VALUE = 10 -- LOAD CÔNG ĐOẠN
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @TEMP (CODE, DESCRIPTION)
		select macd, tencd from tr_congdoan with(nolock) order by 1,2
	END

	IF @VALUE = 11 -- LOAD BỘ PHẬN
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @TEMP (CODE, DESCRIPTION, ATTRIBUTE1)
		select mabophan, tenbophan, ghichu from tr_bophan order by mabophan
	END

	IF @VALUE = 12 -- LOAD ĐƠN VỊ TÍNH
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @TEMP (CODE)
		select tendvt from tr_donvitinh WITH(NOLOCK) order by tendvt
	END

	IF @VALUE = 13 -- LOAD SITE
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @TEMP (CODE, DESCRIPTION)
		select name, description from tr_site WITH(NOLOCK)
	END

	--IF @VALUE = 14 -- LOAD kho
	--BEGIN
	--	INSERT INTO @TEMP (CODE, DESCRIPTION)
	--	select makho, tenkho from tr_kho with(nolock) order by makho, tenkho
	--END

	IF @VALUE = 15 -- LOAD PHÂN XƯỞNG
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @TEMP (CODE, DESCRIPTION)
		select maxuong, tenxuong from tr_phanxuong with(nolock) ORDER BY maxuong
	END

	SELECT * FROM @TEMP;
		
END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_bophan","dbo.tr_congdoan","dbo.tr_donvitinh","dbo.tr_hehang","dbo.tr_khachhang","dbo.tr_khuvuc","dbo.tr_loaidh","dbo.tr_loaisp","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu","dbo.tr_nhacc","dbo.tr_phanxuong","dbo.tr_resource","dbo.tr_site"],"writesTables":[],"flags":[],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
